titleStmt.title: SII 11.82: original edition by C. R. Krishnamacharlu, R. S. Panchamukhi, N. Lakshminaraya Rao and H. K. Narasimhaswami
No. 82. (B.K. No. 92 of 1927-28). SIRŪR, MUNDARGI PETHA, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON A SLAB SET UP NEAR THE SĀLIS' SHOP.

summary.p: This record belongs to the reign of Traiḷōkyamalladēva (i.e. Sōmēśvara I) and is dated in Śaka 970. It is mutilated and damaged. The object of the inscription seems to be to register some gift made by certain Gāvuṇḍas for the benefit of the ascetics attached to a maṭha. Mahāsāmantādhipati Daṇḍanāyaka Mā[di]ṇayya is stated to have been governing five villages in the Māsiyavāḍi One Hundred and Forty and Mahāsāmantādhipati Dāsarasa who is called the vajra of Mādi (i.e. Mādiṇayya) was administering Sirivura (i.e. modern Śirūr).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājā
dhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭāraka satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cā
ḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīma ttraiḷōkyamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōtta
rābhivṛddhipravarddhamānamā candrārkka tāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire ta
tpādapadmōpajīvi samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāsāmantā
dhipati mahāpracaṇḍa daṇḍanāyakaṁ śrīmattraiḷōkyamalla
dēvapādā bja bhṛṅgaṁ nasahāyasūra nāmādisamastaprasastisa
hitaṁ śrīmadaṇḍanāyaka mādiṇayyaṅgaḷ māsiyavā
ḍi nūṟanālvattara baḷiya paṁcagrāmaṅgaḷaṁ sukhasaṁkathāvinō
dadināḷuttire . kandaṁ . kaḷuttamattalati
tattasaraṇe
ppar . vacanaṁ . Antu kandaṁ . kulavadhu
gaḷkā māṅgane sale rōhiṇi lurvvīlalaneya
raṁ pōlisuvudu kaliyugadoḷ .
Avaragratanayanātaṁ vivēka sarōvarahaṁsa
kavigamakavādivāgmiga mavanītaḷadoḷogedāsugaṁ kaḷpakujaṁ . bhīma
parākrama nabhinavarāmaṁ kalikālasūdrakaṁ śīḷa hāsaṁ śrī
manmādiyavajraṁ sāmanta śikhara kāṟaṁ dāsa . Intu samadhigatapaṁ
camahāsabda mahāsāmantādhipati mahāpracaṇḍadaṇḍanāyakaṁ
śrīmatnreḷōkyamalladēva manassaṁtōṣaṁ Arikomaraśikha
riśēkharaṁ Ayyanasiṅgaṁ nāmādi samastaprasasthi sahitaṁ śrīma
nāyaka dāsarasaṁ sirivura maṁ sukhasaṁkatāvinōdadināḷuThe portion covered by dots in this and the
rṣa 970 neya sarvvadhāri saṁvatsarada vaiśākha śu
rvvadandu Āyca gāvuṇḍaṁ nāgadēvagāvuṇḍaṁ
tāraṁ caṁdrasōmabhaḻarara caṁdra kīrtti
maṭhasthānada tapōdhanarkkaḷgaṁ
ṇige sūḍaga The
Digital edition of SII 11.82 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
